'''RonTha''' was a [[Meerian/Legends|Meerian]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. He was a strict follower of rules and protocol, and believed in doing everything according to regulations. He took [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on a tour of the [[Agri-Corps Enrichment Zone]] building, and was very interested in the growth of the [[Plant/Legends|plants]] there, allowing himself to go on at considerable length about one small seed or the other. After Kenobi had been kidnapped from the Agri-Corps building by [[Offworld Mining Corporation|Offworld]] operatives and [[Xanatos]], and taken to the [[deepsea mines]] of Bandomeer, RonTha was questioned by [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], as to whether he had observed anything suspicious. At first, he denied being in the Agri-Corps building that night, as it was against rules to be there after hours. But after continued pressure from Jinn, he succumbed, and admitted that he had been in a [[Orchard (Eastern Enrichment Zone)|orchard]] near the site of Kenobis' kidnapping, as he liked to have fruit from the orchard before bed. He told Jinn that he had seen some men carrying Kenobi away, and had followed in time to see them take him away by boat. He was then persuaded by Jinn to be allowed to take an [[Hydrocraft|Agri-Corps boat]] to rescue young Kenobi.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]'' {{1st}}
